================================================================================
  TAI ERLANG AUTONOMICS - WEEK 1-2 PRODUCTION DEPLOYMENT PACKAGE

  ✅ COMPLETE & READY FOR EXECUTION
  📅 Delivered: 2026-01-26
  🎯 Target: Week 3 Customer Demo
================================================================================

MISSION: Deploy pricing engine and onboarding platform to GCP Cloud Run in Week 1-2

✅ DELIVERED:

1. GCP Infrastructure Setup (Complete)
   ├── Terraform configuration with state management
   ├── Cloud Run service definitions
   ├── Firestore database setup
   ├── Cloud Pub/Sub configuration
   ├── Cloud Load Balancer with SSL/TLS
   ├── Cloud Armor security policies
   ├── Secret Manager integration
   └── Service account & IAM configuration

2. Container & Deployment (Complete)
   ├── Dockerfile/Containerfile optimization
   ├── Cloud Build CI/CD pipeline
   ├── Artifact Registry setup
   ├── Docker push & tag procedures
   └── Multi-stage build configuration

3. Database & Schema (Complete)
   ├── Firestore schema initialization script
   ├── 6 Collections: users, pricing_rules, subscriptions, transactions, audit_logs, signals
   ├── Composite indexes for performance
   ├── TTL policies for data cleanup
   └── Sample data loading

4. Monitoring & Observability (Complete)
   ├── Cloud Monitoring dashboards (pre-configured)
   ├── Alert policies for critical metrics
   ├── PagerDuty integration setup
   ├── Cloud Logging configuration
   ├── Cloud Trace distributed tracing
   ├── Log-based metrics
   └── Automated monitoring setup script

5. Security & Compliance (Complete)
   ├── Cloud Armor DDoS protection
   ├── SSL/TLS certificates (Google-managed)
   ├── Secret Manager for credentials
   ├── IAM role-based access control
   ├── Network security configuration
   ├── Encryption in transit & at rest
   └── Audit logging

6. Testing & Validation (Complete)
   ├── Load testing configuration (JMeter)
   ├── Smoke test suite (bash)
   ├── Health check endpoints
   ├── Backup/restore procedures
   ├── Disaster recovery runbook
   └── Performance baseline setup

7. Documentation (Complete - 5000+ lines)
   ├── 00_START_HERE.md - Quick entry point
   ├── QUICK_START_GUIDE.md - 6-8 hour fast track
   ├── WEEK_1_2_PRODUCTION_DEPLOYMENT.md - 55KB comprehensive guide
   ├── DEPLOYMENT_RUNBOOK.md - Step-by-step procedures (130+ commands)
   ├── IMPLEMENTATION_CHECKLIST.md - Day-by-day tracking
   ├── DEPLOYMENT_SUMMARY.md - Package overview
   ├── INDEX.md - File navigation
   ├── Troubleshooting guides
   ├── Cost analysis
   └── Architecture diagrams

8. Automation Scripts (Complete)
   ├── firestore-schema-init.sh - Database setup
   ├── monitoring-alerts-setup.sh - Monitoring configuration
   └── smoke-test.sh - Validation tests

9. Configuration Files (Complete)
   ├── terraform-production.tfvars - GCP variables
   ├── terraform-loadbalancer.tf - Load balancer config
   ├── cloud-build.yaml - CI/CD pipeline
   └── load-test-jmeter.jmx - Load testing

HOW TO GET STARTED:

1. IMMEDIATE (5 minutes)
   → Read: ./tai-erlang-autonomics/execution/week-1-2/00_START_HERE.md

2. THIS WEEK (1 hour)
   → Read: QUICK_START_GUIDE.md
   → Review cost & timeline
   → Assign team roles

3. WEEK 1 EXECUTION (40 hours)
   → Follow: DEPLOYMENT_RUNBOOK.md
   → Track with: IMPLEMENTATION_CHECKLIST.md
   → Execute scripts in order

4. WEEK 2 EXECUTION (20 hours)
   → Complete services deployment
   → Setup monitoring & testing
   → Validate all systems

5. WEEK 3 (Customer Demo)
   → Go-live with production system
   → Run demo
   → Transition to operations

================================================================================

TIMELINE:

Week 1 (5 days = 40 hours):
  Monday    → GCP Setup & Terraform (6 hours)
  Tue-Wed   → Docker Build & Push (10 hours)
  Thursday  → Terraform Configuration (6 hours)
  Friday    → Infrastructure Deploy (4 hours)

Week 2 (5 days = 20 hours):
  Monday    → Cloud Run Deploy + LB (4 hours)
  Tuesday   → DNS & SSL (4 hours)
  Wed-Fri   → Monitoring, Testing, Validation (12 hours)

Total: 60-80 hours (2-3 engineers)

================================================================================

KEY FEATURES:

✨ Production-Ready
  • Terraform Infrastructure as Code
  • Cloud Armor DDoS protection
  • Automated SSL/TLS renewal
  • Health checks & autoscaling
  • Distributed tracing enabled

✨ Highly Observable
  • Cloud Monitoring dashboards
  • Alert policies with PagerDuty
  • Comprehensive logging
  • Performance metrics baseline

✨ Secure
  • Secret Manager for credentials
  • IAM role-based access
  • Service account isolation
  • Network security policies
  • Encryption configured

✨ Automated
  • Cloud Build CI/CD pipeline
  • Infrastructure as Code (Terraform)
  • Smoke test suite
  • Load testing configuration

✨ Well-Documented
  • 5000+ lines of guidance
  • Step-by-step procedures
  • Daily checklist
  • Troubleshooting guide

SUCCESS METRICS (End of Week 2):

Infrastructure:
  ✅ 2 Cloud Run services running & healthy
  ✅ Firestore database initialized with schema
  ✅ Load Balancer routing HTTPS traffic
  ✅ SSL/TLS certificates valid & auto-renewing

Operations:
  ✅ Monitoring dashboards showing 24+ hours of metrics
  ✅ Alert policies configured & tested
  ✅ PagerDuty integration active
  ✅ Cloud Logging receiving all service logs

Testing:
  ✅ Load test baselines established
  ✅ Performance targets met (p99 < 1s)
  ✅ Smoke tests all passing
  ✅ Backup/restore procedures tested

Team:
  ✅ Team trained on deployment procedures
  ✅ On-call rotation established
  ✅ Runbooks documented
  ✅ Week 3 demo ready

COST SUMMARY:

Week 1-2 Testing:  $300-500
Production Baseline: $3,200-3,600/month

Breakdown:
  Cloud Run (pricing):    $2,314/month
  Cloud Run (onboarding):   $401/month
  Firestore:               $41/month
  Load Balancer:          $229/month
  Monitoring & Logging:    $600/month
  Other (Pub/Sub, etc):     $15/month
  ─────────────────────────────────────
  TOTAL:                ~$3,600/month

================================================================================

SUPPORT:

Questions about deployment?
  → Read the appropriate guide
  → Check DEPLOYMENT_RUNBOOK.md troubleshooting
  → Review GCP documentation

Issues during execution?
  → Check service logs: gcloud logging read
  → Verify permissions: gcloud iam get-iam-policy
  → Check GCP status: https://status.cloud.google.com

Need help?
  → Contact infrastructure lead with error details
  → Include full command output
  → Provide GCP project ID and region

SUMMARY:

You have a complete, production-grade deployment package that includes:
  • Complete infrastructure as code (Terraform)
  • Automated setup scripts (bash)
  • Comprehensive documentation (5000+ lines)
  • Testing & validation suite
  • Monitoring & alerting pre-configured
  • Security built-in from the start

Everything needed to deploy TAI Erlang Autonomics to GCP Cloud Run in 2 weeks
is in this directory. The deployment is scalable, secure, and production-ready.

Total effort: 60-80 hours with 2-3 engineers
Timeline: 2 weeks
Cost: ~$300-500 (testing), ~$3,600/month (production)
